_meta.purpose: MVR Item 9.2 — TraceTable example. Copy & edit the `config` block; the outer wrapper shows how it sits inside leaf_subtopics.interactive_blocks JSONB.
_meta.based_on: Mushthofa dkk. 2023 Bab 2, sub-bab 2.7 For-Loop hal. 59

config.prompt: Telusuri eksekusi pseudokode berikut. Isi nilai `i` dan `total` di setiap langkah eksekusi loop.
config.pseudocode:
total <- 0
FOR i FROM 1 TO 4 DO
    total <- total + i
ENDFOR
OUTPUT total
